invariants.title: Scope ownership is explicit
invariants.statement: Long-lived loops and workers must have explicit scope ownership; detached task lifetimes are forbidden unless explicitly audited.

invariants.title: Capability context propagation is explicit
invariants.statement: Runtime-effectful paths propagate Cx (or approved adapters). Cx::for_testing() remains test-only.

invariants.title: Outcome semantics are preserved
invariants.statement: Success, error, cancellation, and panic paths remain distinguishable in logs and contracts.

invariants.title: Cancellation boundaries are intentional
invariants.statement: Cancellation checkpoints are explicit and positioned to avoid irreversible side-effect loss windows.

invariants.title: Runtime API access is centralized
invariants.statement: Doctrine-compliant modules use runtime_compat/cx boundaries rather than ad hoc mixed runtime calls.

legacy_to_target_map.required_behavior: No orphan tasks; explicit ownership and cancellation lifecycle.
legacy_to_target_map.user_visible_change: Shutdown progress reports identify owning scope and reason codes.

legacy_to_target_map.target_pattern: asupersync race/select with explicit cancellation handling
legacy_to_target_map.required_behavior: No dropped critical messages during race resolution.
legacy_to_target_map.user_visible_change: Cancellation outcomes are deterministic and reason-coded.

legacy_to_target_map.required_behavior: Deterministic timeout behavior with structured error taxonomy.
legacy_to_target_map.user_visible_change: Timeout failures include actionable reason and remediation hints.

legacy_to_target_map.required_behavior: No silent cancellation-loss windows in command/event paths.
legacy_to_target_map.user_visible_change: Event/command delivery failures are explicit, never silent.

legacy_to_target_map.required_behavior: Single startup/shutdown policy surface per process role.
legacy_to_target_map.user_visible_change: Consistent startup and shutdown status messaging across CLI/watch/robot/web.

anti_patterns.description: New direct tokio::* usage in doctrine-migrated modules.
Mixed direct asupersync::* and runtime_compat::* usage without explicit boundary rationale.
Cx::for_testing() appearing in non-test production paths.
Cancellation/panic collapsed into generic errors that erase reason visibility.

user_facing_guarantees.title: No silent command/event loss
user_facing_guarantees.contract: Command/event paths must report cancellation and delivery outcomes explicitly.
user_facing_guarantees.operator_signal: reason_code plus correlation_id in structured logs

user_facing_guarantees.title: Deterministic shutdown messaging
user_facing_guarantees.contract: Shutdown progression must remain visible with reason-coded final state.

user_facing_guarantees.title: Actionable failure guidance
user_facing_guarantees.contract: Failure responses include reason code, concise remediation hint, and evidence reference.
user_facing_guarantees.operator_signal: error_code plus artifact_path in structured logs
